title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Yamato, Zoro as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ZOROJURO is back in action!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Standing shoulder to shoulder....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: thing

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Go Get'em, Sangoro- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It really did heal him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm afraid to think about what will happen after though...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: KING!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: QVEEN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How dare you attack the all-stars?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Drop it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nicely done, Kawa- Matsu!! Everyone, listen up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't let anybody interfere with their duel!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But boss, they're up against the all-stars!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter if you're friend or foe, there's no place for meddling in that fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just look at the expressions on their faces, we would only get in their way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought only Mary Geoise was above the Red Line- Yoi?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm talking about the distant past...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Back then God's land was up there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When did you start believing such crap, pops?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wake up, Marco!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gura- Rara!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: AGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's with you? How can you space out on a battlefield?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hehe! Well, I knew you'd have my back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh, shut up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Say, 120, do you believe in God?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you're starting to sound like pops did when he was drunk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yo, if you wanna take us down...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're gonna have to put your backs into it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That didn't even hurt a bit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The drought, the plague, and the Wildfire!! The three of us are Kaido- San's Calamities!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our unstoppable touchness is why they call us all-stars!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: nothing. It's just since my second time using the raid suit,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've been feeling kinda off...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not gonna slow me down, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I said it's nothing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My body just feels a little odd...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Well you do have weird eye- brows.

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: My body, not my face, doofus!�

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: SHING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You owe me one!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
